file_insights.purpose: Public API barrel export for Order module
key_exports: Type definitions for all Order entities
file_insights.patterns: Organized into logical sections (Module Definition, Services, Repositories, Controllers, Routes, Events, Types, Schemas) with clear comments and example usage

file_insights.purpose: Event definitions and emitters for Order module domain events
key_exports: TypeScript event types for all Order module operations
file_insights.patterns: Comprehensive event system with typed payloads, async emitter functions, base event payload inheritance, organized by domain entity (Order, Table, Zone, QRCode, Customer, ServiceRequest, Feedback)

file_insights.purpose: Module definition and initialization for Order module
file_insights.patterns: Standard module pattern with initialization logic, hook system for extensibility, configuration validation, dependency injection support
file_insights.lines_of_code: Not shown in diff but referenced

file_insights.purpose: Route definitions and path builders for Order module API endpoints
key_exports: Route groups (orderRoutes, tableRoutes, zoneRoutes, qrcodeRoutes, customerRoutes, serviceRequestRoutes, feedbackRoutes)
file_insights.patterns: Centralized route management with builder functions, public/protected route classification, organized by resource type
file_insights.lines_of_code: Not shown in diff but referenced

patterns_discovered.description: Central index.ts file aggregates all module exports with organized sections and clear documentation. Enables clean imports from module root.
patterns_discovered.benefit: Reduces import path complexity and provides single source of truth for module API

patterns_discovered.description: Event system with strongly typed payload interfaces inheriting from BaseEventPayload, organized event emitter functions, and event registry
patterns_discovered.benefit: Type-safe event handling across the module with clear event contracts

patterns_discovered.description: Single event module handles events for 7 different entity types (Order, Table, Zone, QRCode, Customer, ServiceRequest, Feedback)
patterns_discovered.benefit: Centralized event management while maintaining logical separation by entity

patterns_discovered.description: All entity types, response types, and hook contexts exported from index.ts with clear documentation
patterns_discovered.benefit: Enables complete type safety for module consumers

patterns_discovered.description: Routes organized by resource type with path builders and metadata management
patterns_discovered.benefit: Scalable route management as module grows

patterns_discovered.description: OrderModule includes initialize, validate, and shutdown hooks
patterns_discovered.benefit: Extensible module system with clear lifecycle management

gotchas_discovered.description: The order.events.ts file handles 25+ different event types across multiple entities. Maintaining consistency across all event payload interfaces is complex.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use BaseEventPayload inheritance and consistent naming conventions (OrderCreatedEventPayload, OrderStatusChangedEventPayload pattern)

gotchas_discovered.description: All event emitter functions (emitOrderCreated, emitOrderUpdated, etc.) must have consistent async signatures accepting EventService and specific payload types
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Implement as async functions returning Promise<void>, use consistent parameter naming

gotchas_discovered.description: Events may need to trigger actions in other modules (e.g., OrderCreated -> Loyalty module). Event system needs careful coordination.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use event service as central hub with proper error handling and logging

gotchas_discovered.description: Multiple route groups (orderRoutes, tableRoutes, etc.) within same module could lead to configuration inconsistencies
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Use builder functions and metadata objects to centralize route definitions

gotchas_discovered.description: index.ts exports 50+ types from various submodules. Changes to type structures ripple through multiple imports.
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Organize types by concern, use clear naming conventions, document breaking changes

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully created comprehensive Order module infrastructure with routes, events, and module definition
deliverables: Public API barrel export (index.ts) with 339 lines of organized exports and documentation
Complete typed event system (order.events.ts) with 25+ event types covering all module entities
Module definition with lifecycle hooks and configuration management
Route organization system with path builders and endpoint metadata
quality_indicators: Well-documented code with JSDoc comments and usage examples
Clear organizational structure with logical separation of concerns
Consistent naming conventions across all exports
Complete event coverage for all module operations
approach_outcome.completion_metrics: All 4 files created/modified as planned with full feature implementation

recommendations.recommendation: Create unit tests for event emitter functions to ensure proper EventService integration and payload validation
Document event flow diagrams showing which events trigger which module actions to help developers understand the event cascade
Create a route registry or documentation listing all endpoints with their access levels (public/protected) to prevent inconsistencies
Consider creating a type-safe event emitter wrapper to enforce correct payload types at compile time
As more entities are added to the module, consider splitting order.events.ts into sub-files (order.events.ts, table.events.ts, etc.) to manage complexity
Add VSCode snippets for common event emission patterns to improve developer productivity
